rat_attack.name: Rat staring at you
rat_attack.content: A rat stares at you from the shadows. It doesn’t run away.

rat_attack2.name: Rat calling friends
rat_attack2.content: The rat lets out a shrill squeak. More are coming.

rat_attack3.name: Rat & friends around
rat_attack3.content: They circle around you. Too close.

rat_attack4.name: Rat & friends attack
rat_attack4.content: A bite. Blood is flowing. The rats leave.

rat_attack5.name: Rat nest
rat_attack5.content: You find a nest. Dozens of rats.
